recommendations.rationale: Tencent showed relative resilience on a risk-off day, but the trend remains weak and price is still below both short- and medium-term averages.
evidence: Closed +0.098% while average stock move was -2.341% in a risk_off session
Latest close 508.5 remains below MA20 517.715 and MA60 551.1467
60-day range position is 0.1777, near the lower end of its range
Regime flag is downtrend
risks: Downtrend can resume despite relative strength
